violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (beverages) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice voluntarily disposed. Taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

Sandwiches, rte desserts, and dairy products was observed held at (50-59 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
Beverages were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler, back storage area, and retail area ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

Grab n Go Cooler located in the (retail) area was not in good repair. Observed ambient temperatures at 55DF. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until replaced and/or repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

The floors in walk in cooler and back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the storage shelves (walk-in cooler) have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
